<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Next.js portfolio for engineering projects
  - TypeScript for type safety
  - Tailwind CSS for styling
  - Modern animations and smooth UX

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Manually created Next.js project structure with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
  - Configured App Router with layout.tsx and page.tsx
  - Set up ESLint with Next.js configuration
  - Configured import aliases (@/* for root imports)

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Created all portfolio components (HeroSection, ProjectsSection, AboutSection, ContactSection, Navigation, Footer)
  - Implemented dark mode support with Tailwind CSS
  - Added smooth animations and transitions
  - Configured metadata for SEO in layout.tsx
  - Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
x] Install Required Extensions
  - Tailwind CSS configuration is complete; VS Code extensions optional
  - Tailwind CSS IntelliSense (optional but recommended)

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - Run npm install (or bun/yarn install)
  - Run build verification with npm run build
  - Check for any TypeScript or ESLint errors

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  - Create VS Code tasks.json for dev server
  - Configure build and start tasks

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Start development server

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with setup and customization instructions
  - Next: Clean up this checklist

Project Stack: Next.js 14+ | TypeScript | Tailwind CSS | React
